subcodes.title: Address to the Baha'is at 309 W 78th St in New York, 1912-11-16
subcodes.first_line: Wherever the mention of Baha'u'llah rises up, that is the paradise of Abha.
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @high station of the true believer, @mission of the Manifestation of God in the world, @spiritual transformation, @suffering and imprisonment
